use_cases: Displaying scrolling text content with automatic horizontal or vertical movement
Creating testimonial carousels that continuously animate across the screen
Building news tickers or announcement banners for websites
Showcasing partner logos or client testimonials in a space-efficient manner
Displaying scrolling feature highlights or benefit lists
ai_summary: A lightweight Marquee component that renders child elements in a continuously scrolling container. Supports pause-on-hover functionality through a boolean prop, making it ideal for displaying testimonials, announcements, or logo carousels. Acts as a simple HTML div wrapper with optional pause behavior for common animation patterns.
